summary.zhHant: Chicken Noodle Soup is a practical two-person Taiwanese dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.yue: Chicken Noodle Soup is a practical two-person Taiwanese dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.
summary.en: Chicken Noodle Soup is a practical two-person Taiwanese dinner with clear grocery quantities and a home-cookable flow.

nutritionAssumptions.reason: Included as a practical cooking-fat estimate for the two-person method.
Included as a light seasoning estimate; users can reduce salt to taste.

detail.zhHant: Set out Chicken thigh, Pasta, Eggplant, Light soy sauce, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Chicken Noodle Soup cooks evenly for two people.
detail.yue: Set out Chicken thigh, Pasta, Eggplant, Light soy sauce, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Chicken Noodle Soup cooks evenly for two people.
detail.en: Set out Chicken thigh, Pasta, Eggplant, Light soy sauce, Olive oil, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Chicken Noodle Soup cooks evenly for two people.

detail.zhHant: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Chicken thigh until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.yue: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Chicken thigh until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.en: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Chicken thigh until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.

detail.zhHant: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.yue: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.en: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.

detail.zhHant: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Chicken Noodle Soup in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.yue: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Chicken Noodle Soup in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.en: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Chicken Noodle Soup in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
